payload.message:
It's 7am ET — time for Lauren's daily briefing. Do the following and send it as ONE message via the message tool (action=send, target=-1003805134407, threadId=5):

1. Get Atlanta weather for today using: curl -s 'https://api.open-meteo.com/v1/forecast?latitude=33.749&longitude=-84.388&daily=temperature_2m_max,temperature_2m_min,precipitation_probability_max,weathercode&temperature_unit=fahrenheit&timezone=America/New_York&forecast_days=1'

2. Get today's PERSONAL calendar events: gog calendar events primary --from <today>T00:00:00-04:00 --to <today>T23:59:59-04:00 --account lhaile7@gmail.com --client personal --json. Show all events for the day.

3. Get today's WORK calendar (free/busy): gog calendar events 'lauren.haile@superhuman.com' --from <today>T00:00:00-04:00 --to <today>T12:00:00-04:00 --account lhaile7@gmail.com --client personal --json. These are free/busy only (no titles). If there are any busy blocks before noon, flag them with a heads-up like '⚠️ You have X work meetings this morning' and list the time slots so she doesn't miss them.

4. Get Todoist tasks from the Home project only: curl -s 'https://api.todoist.com/api/v1/tasks?project_id=6CrfMRHRfR8HcwQF' -H 'Authorization: Bearer $TODOIST_API_TOKEN' — show tasks due today, plus flag any overdue items.

5. Format it all into a clean, friendly morning briefing. Keep it concise but warm. Use emoji section headers. Send via message tool.
